title: pinus excelsa var. peuce
intro: Pinus excelsa var. peuce, also known as Bosnian pine or white pine, is a variant of the Pinus excelsa species found in the Balkan Peninsula. The resin of this plant contains terpenes and sesquiterpenes, which are used for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pinus excelsa var. peuce include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, as well as exhibiting potential antioxidant and antiviral properties. The resin can be used to make herbal preparations such as essential oils, ointments, and infusions, which are traditionally used to treat various health conditions, although modern scientific research on its efficacy is limited.
